reasoning: [ANCHOR] POC: 67774.617 | VAH: 70883.366 | VAL: 62232.934 | Current: 66410.7. The market exhibits a classic 'Passive Seller Absorption' pattern: a positive Order Flow Delta (+865 BTC) failing to lift prices, which are instead drifting lower and forming lower highs on the 15m chart. This Order Flow Divergence, combined with price trading below the POC (67774.6), creates a high-probability SHORT setup despite the low Volume Breakout Ratio (0.33). The POC now acts as a firm structural ceiling. TP_FORMULA: 66410.7 - (2.5 * 522.6) = 65104.2. SL_FORMULA: 66410.7 + (1.8 * 522.6) = 67351.4. RR: 1.39. Confidence is capped at 60% due to the low-volume environment which may lead to extended sideways chop before the target is reached.
reasoning_zh: [锚点] POC: 67774.617 | VAH: 70883.366 | VAL: 62232.934 | 当前价格: 66410.7。市场表现出经典的“被动卖方吸收”模式：正向订单流 Delta (+865 BTC) 未能推高价格，价格反而阴跌并在 15 分钟图表上形成较低的高点。这种订单流背离，结合价格处于 POC (67774.6) 下方交易，尽管成交量突破比率较低 (0.33)，仍构成了高概率的做空设置。POC 现在充当坚实的结构性天花板。止盈公式：66410.7 - (2.5 * 522.6) = 65104.2。止损公式：66410.7 + (1.8 * 522.6) = 67351.4。盈亏比：1.39。由于低成交量环境可能导致在触及目标前出现长时间的横盘震荡，信心评分为 60%。
